results.title: 2026 Tata Tiago Variant Breakdown — Base Smart vs Top Creative Plus!
results.description: The 2026 Tata Tiago in India starts at Rs 4.69 lakh (ex-showroom) and offers six variants: Smart, Pure, Pure+, Pure+ A, Creative and Creative+. The car features a 1.2-litre Revotron engine with petrol and CNG options.

results.title: Sui Addresses Three Network Outages With Major Upgrade
results.description: The Sui blockchain has deployed a major network upgrade to fix bugs that caused three outages and over 15 hours of downtime last week, according to the Sui Foundation.
